project.name: claude-remote
project.description: Remote Claude Code interface - Web-based IDE with chat, file explorer, terminal, and multi-session support

features.name: Multi-Session Chat
features.description: Multiple concurrent chat sessions with isolated message history
features.notes: Fixed bug where messages leaked between sessions. Now messages stored per-session in messagesBySession record

features.name: File Explorer
features.description: Browse project files and open in editor

features.name: Git Integration
features.description: View git status, changes, and diffs

features.name: Project Browser
features.description: Server-side folder browser for selecting projects
features.notes: Uses browse:list event to get directory contents from server

architecture_patterns.description: Bidirectional real-time communication between client and server
Messages keyed by sessionId to prevent cross-contamination
architecture_patterns.implementation: messagesBySession: Record<string, Message[]> in Zustand store

patterns.name: Session-Scoped State
patterns.description: Store messages per-session instead of globally
patterns.usage: When switching sessions, only show messages for that session

patterns.name: WebSocket Event Ref Pattern
patterns.description: Use useRef to avoid stale closures in WebSocket handlers

gotchas.cause: Global messages array not filtered by session
gotchas.solution: Changed to messagesBySession Record with sessionId key
Added sessionId to all message events (message:chunk, message:done, etc.)

conventions: All WebSocket events must include sessionId when session-specific
Use useAppStore.getState() in handlers to avoid stale closures

recent_changes.details: Messages now stored per-session instead of global. Added sessionId to all message events.
